name: I talked to insurance adjuster already about my neck injury, did I mess up?
description: Be cautious; get lawyer before more talks.[7]

mainEntity.name: I talked to insurance adjuster already about my neck injury, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Be cautious; get lawyer before more talks.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly if you admitted fault or downplayed; statements can be used against you.[7] Key factors: (1) Don't sign releases; (2) Record all calls; (3) Lawyer reviews. Limit further talks. Correct with medical facts.
